complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.本章说明如何在系统中创建并执行检测任务、在实时检测页面中监控生产、通过复检页面审: This chapter covers how to start an inspection task, monitor production from the Live page, review defects and submit feedback from the Review page, and iterate the model through that feedback.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.完成 PCB 产品创建并训练后，返回主页，点击 **新建检测任务**。弹窗标题为: After creating and training a PCB product, return to Home and click **New Inspection Task**. The **New Inspection Task** dialog opens; configure:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.选择对应的传送带（Conveyor A / B 等）。下拉选项旁会显示绿色（可用: Pick the conveyor (Conveyor A / B / …). Each option is annotated with a green (available) or red (in use) status dot.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.从列表中选择目标 PCB 产品。可通过标签筛选缩小选项。点击 **刷新产品列表*: Pick the target PCB product from the list. Filter the list by tag to narrow the options. Click **Refresh product list** to pull the latest data.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**自动连续运行任务**：适用于正式产线，板件进板后自动触发检测并循环。: **Continuous automatic**: for production lines — each board triggers an inspection automatically and loops.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**通过按钮触发运行任务**：每次检测须由操作员手动点击触发，适合调试阶段逐板查: **Trigger via button**: every inspection requires an explicit operator click — useful for board-by-board debugging.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**当检测到缺陷时自动停止检测以进行手动检查**：（等同于 ``pause_wh: **Auto-stop on defect for manual review**: equivalent to ``pause_when_ng=true`` — the system pauses on NG and jumps straight to the Review page.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.勾选后系统以演示模式启动。演示模式下，检测任务自动运行，当检测到缺陷时系统会在复: When checked, the system starts in demo mode. In demo mode the inspection task runs by itself; when a defect is flagged the system lingers on the Review page for about 7 seconds, then returns to Live and continues. Press ``Esc`` to exit demo mode; manual button triggers are disabled in demo mode. Demo mode needs no physical boards or hardware — useful for training and flow validation.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.若同时选择两个 PCBA，系统启用 A/B 面检测。此时每个产品均须在编程页面定: Selecting two PCBAs at once enables A/B-side mode. Each product must define **exactly one Unique Marker** on its programming page to distinguish A from B. If the two Unique Markers are too similar, the system rejects the start with an error.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.完成配置后点击 **开始检测**，系统进行预检（模型状态检查、传送带权限获取）后: Click **Start Inspection** to start. The system runs preflight checks (model status, conveyor token acquisition) and then jumps to the Live page.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.在连续检测模式下，遇到错误时系统是否自动停止由 ``pause_when_ng`: In continuous mode, whether the system auto-stops on error is controlled by the ``pause_when_ng`` setting (see :ref:`系统JSON配置`):
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.``true``：检测到 NG（不良）或发生异常时，系统会自动暂停当前任务并停留: ``true``: on NG or any other error, the system pauses the running task and stays at the offending sub-board so the operator can inspect and handle it; the record is marked NG and written to the task data. Use when board-by-board confirmation or immediate intervention is required.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.``false``：发生 NG 时系统不会中断生产，会按既定节拍继续运行并记录该: ``false``: on NG the system does not interrupt production; it continues at the configured cadence and logs the sub-board as NG (or hands it to the configured sorting policy). Use when throughput matters and after-the-fact sampling or automated sorting is acceptable.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.进入 ``/inspection/live`` 后，界面分为左侧传送带控制菜单、: ``/inspection/live`` is split into three areas: the conveyor-control menu on the left, the image area in the center, and the statistics panel on the right.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.页面左侧的竖排图标菜单，提供以下操作按钮（从上到下）：: The vertical icon menu on the left exposes (top to bottom):
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**进板并检测** （空格键）：进板后立即触发一次检测。: **PCB In and Inspect** (Space): bring a board in and trigger one inspection immediately.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**连续** / **停止连续**：开启或关闭自动连续检测模式。: **Continuous / Stop Continuous**: enable or disable automatic continuous inspection.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**检测**：仅触发一次检测，不进板。: **Inspect**: trigger one inspection without loading a board.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**进板**：仅让板件进入传送带，不触发检测。: **PCB In**: load a board onto the conveyor without triggering inspection.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**通过**：令板件直接通过（不检测）。: **Pass-through**: send the board through without inspecting.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.进板类操作（**进板并检测**、**进板**、**出板**、**通过**）需要传: The conveyor-loading actions (**PCB In and Inspect**, **PCB In**, **PCB Out**, **Pass-through**) need the conveyor access token; the buttons are greyed out without it.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.右侧面板中部。显示当前任务内已检测板件的合格（**合格**）与不合格（**不合格: Middle of the right panel. Shows OK (**Pass**) and NG (**Fail**) counts for inspected boards in the current task, with a donut chart.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.产品统计下方（由 ``Live.jsx`` 注入 ``InspectionSta: Below product statistics (injected by ``Live.jsx`` into ``InspectionStatsPanel`` as a child). Shows component-level metrics: **Inspected**, **Pass rate**, **Defect rate**, **False-positive rate**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.显示上一块板的检测耗时（秒）。未完成任何检测时显示 ``-``。: Shows the elapsed time (seconds) for the most recent board. Displays ``-`` when no inspection has finished.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.统计面板上方有一个 Segmented 切换控件，选项为 **整板** 和 **: A Segmented control above the stats panel offers **Board** and **Sub-board**:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**整板**：以整块 PCB 为单位计算直通率（合格板 / 已检测板），标签显示: **Board**: First-pass yield is computed per whole PCB (passed boards / inspected boards); the label reads **Board FPY**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**子板**：以子板为单位计算（仅适用于拼板产品），标签显示 **子板直通率**: **Sub-board**: computed per sub-board, available only for panelized products; the label reads **Sub-board FPY**. Non-panelized products show **N/A**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.此设置通过 Redux（``state.setting.fpyMode``）持久: The choice persists via Redux (``state.setting.fpyMode``) and survives page reload. See :ref:`检测设置（子板判废逻辑）` for the full reference.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.检测结果为合格时，图像区上方会显示绿色全屏提示横幅，显示 **合格**。: When the result is Pass, a full-width green banner reading **Pass** overlays the image area.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.拼板产品检测到有子板被判为废板时，界面会显示红色警告区域，包含以下信息：: When a panel product has a sub-board judged wasted, a red alert region appears with:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.说明：**检测到的缺陷数量超出阈值。**: Description: **Detected defect count exceeds the threshold.**
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.已启用比例模式时显示：**子版缺陷率阈值** 及当前阈值值。: When ratio mode is on: **Sub-board defect-rate threshold** plus the current threshold value.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.已启用坏板标记模式时额外显示斜体提示：**此产品已启用坏板标记模式 — 坏板判定: When badmark mode is on, an italic note is added: **This product has badmark mode enabled — the bad-board verdict may be driven by the badmark check rather than the failure ratio.**
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.表格列出废板子板的编号（``#``）和元件NG率（**元件NG率**）。: A table lists each wasted sub-board's number (``#``) and **Component NG rate**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.检测复审页面: Defect review on the Live page
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.检测到缺陷时，系统会自动跳转到缺陷详情视图，可查看放大图、定位框、缺陷类型和判定: When a defect is detected, the system jumps to the defect detail view. You can examine the zoomed image, the localization box, the defect type and the deciding feature, and submit feedback immediately.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.对于配置了双轨检测的系统，检测页面会同时显示左右两条传送带的并行检测视图；操作与: On systems with two conveyors, the Live page shows both lanes side by side. The operations are the same as for a single conveyor, with extra per-lane navigation:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.按 ``Enter`` 会查询未读的检测记录，默认优先显示左轨，随后显示右轨（两: Press ``Enter`` to look up unreviewed records — the left lane is searched first, then the right (the lanes count and roll up independently).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.通过上方标签页在\"左轨 / 右轨\"间切换，分别查看各自的历史记录与缺陷详情。: Use the tabs at the top to switch between *Left lane* and *Right lane* and inspect each lane's history and defects separately.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.复检页面（``/inspection/review``）用于审核检测结果、提交缺: The Review page (``/inspection/review``) is where you audit results, submit defect feedback, and create variations. Layout: NG component list on the left, image viewer in the middle, feedback and feature-error panel on the right.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.复检页面整体视图：左侧 NG 元件列表、中间检测视图与右侧基准视图: Review page overall view: NG component list (left), inspection viewer (center), and golden viewer (right).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.滚动列表，显示当前检测记录中所有被判为不合格的元件（设计位号）及其错误数量。点击: Scrollable list of every NG component in the current record (by designator), with each row showing the error count. Clicking a row selects the component; the image area jumps to its defect view. Rows tagged as *ROI redefined* carry a yellow left-border indicator.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.上半区显示整板缩略图（基准 + 检测结果叠加），下半区显示所选元件的放大缺陷图、: The top half shows the whole-board thumbnail (golden + inspection-result overlay); the bottom half shows the selected component's enlarged defect image, localization box, and golden image. Press ``\`` to cycle through **Grid (top & bottom)**, **Focus bottom**, and **Focus top** layouts.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**右侧上方：元件级错误和缺陷反馈**: **Upper right: component-level error and defect feedback**
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.显示系统配置的所有反馈类别（由 ``systemMetadata.error_t: Shows every feedback category configured on the system (driven by ``systemMetadata.error_type_to_code``); each card's lower-right corner shows its keyboard shortcut (see the shortcut table below). Click a card or press its shortcut to submit component-level feedback. The currently-predicted error category is highlighted (red background); already-submitted entries display a thumbs-up icon.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.可折叠，显示所选元件各特征（本体、焊料、引脚等）的详细检测结果，并可分别提交特征: Collapsible. Shows the detailed inspection result for each feature on the selected component (body, solder, leads, and so on) and lets you submit feature-level feedback, add a fuzzy match, or add a variation reference.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.拼板产品时显示，列出当前板各子板的状态及元件NG率。使用 ``→`` 键可切换到: Shown on panel products. Lists every sub-board's status and component NG rate. Press ``→`` to advance to the next sub-board index.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**返回实时检测**：回到 ``/inspection/live`` 页面。: **Back to Live**: return to the ``/inspection/live`` page.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**返回工作列表**：回到数据分析报告页面。: **Back to Worklist**: return to the Data Analysis Report.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.当某元件外观与基准差异较大但属可接受情形（如封装变化、引脚形态变化等），可在右侧: When a component's appearance differs significantly from the golden but is acceptable (package change, lead-shape variation, and so on), click **Set as Alternative** in the right panel or press ``F``. Two paths are available:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**沿用当前元件图像**：使用当前检测图像直接创建替代料。: **Keep current component image**: use the current inspection image as the variation's reference and create it directly.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**在视野图上绘制 ROI**：在 FOV 图上重新圈定元件区域后再创建替代料。: **Define new ROI on FOV**: re-box the component area on the FOV image, then create the variation.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.创建完成后系统提示是否停止正在运行的检测任务——新建替代料需在模板编辑页重新训练: After creation, the system asks whether to stop the running task — a new variation only takes effect after retraining in the Template Editor. See :doc:`../features/variations` for the full reference.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.完成反馈后，可将当前检测记录标注为已复检，供后续数据分析使用。: After submitting feedback, you can mark the current inspection record as reviewed so downstream analysis can pick it up.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.复检页面底部的 **快捷键说明栏** 显示常用快捷键（不含上下文相关快捷键）：: The **keyboard help footer** at the bottom of the Review page shows the common shortcuts (context-specific ones aren't listed):
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.切换到下一个不良特征/元件视图: Switch to the next defective feature / component view
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.切换视图布局（网格 / 聚焦下排 / 聚焦上排）: Cycle viewer layout (Grid / Focus bottom / Focus top)
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.``F`` 键为上下文快捷键，**不在底部快捷键说明栏中显示**：选中 OCR/: ``F`` is a context-specific shortcut and **does not appear in the footer**: when an OCR / text feature is selected in the right-hand feature panel, pressing ``F`` adds a fuzzy match or a variation. Only effective while an OCR / text feature is selected.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.反馈快捷键仅识别 ``1``–``9``，不识别 ``0``。对应关系如下：``: The feedback shortcuts use ``1``–``9`` only — ``0`` is not bound. Mapping: ``1``–``9`` → categories 1–9; ``Ctrl+1``–``9`` → 10–18 (offset +9); ``Alt+1``–``9`` → 19–27 (offset +18); ``Ctrl+Alt+1``–``9`` → 28–36 (offset +27). Up to 36 categories are addressable. The actual category bound to each slot is configured by the administrator under ``error_type_to_code``.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.在主页点击 **工作列表** 进入 **数据分析报告** （路由 ``/work: Click **Worklist** on Home to open the **Data Analysis Report** (``/worklist``). Four tabs sit at the top, with the filter bar below; the content area swaps with the selected tab.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**总结**：总览统计指标、NG/OK 环形图及前十不良元件柱状图。: **Summary**: overview metrics, the NG / OK donut chart, and the top-10 defective-components bar chart.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**检测结果**：逐条列出每次检测记录，支持进入复检。: **Inspection Results**: lists every inspection record one by one; can jump into Review.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**不良元件**：按元件维度汇总不良结果，便于定位高发问题元件。: **Defective Components**: aggregates defective results at the component level — highlights repeat offenders.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**误判元件**：按元件维度汇总误报结果，用于优化模型减少误报。: **False-Positive Components**: aggregates false-positive results at the component level — used to tune the model and cut false positives.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.过滤栏位于标签页下方，所有标签页共用以下过滤项：: The filter bar sits under the tab strip and is shared across all tabs:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**按基准产品过滤**：下拉选择指定产品（仅限已训练的基准产品），不选则显示全部: **Filter by golden product**: drop-down to pick one product (trained golden products only). Leave empty to show all products.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**时间范围**：日期时间区间选择器（**从** / **到**）。可直接输入或: **Time range**: a date-time range picker (**From** / **To**). Type the values, or click the quick presets — **Today**, **Yesterday**, **This Week**, **This Month**, **This Year**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**按序列号搜索**：按板件序列号（S/N）过滤。: **Search by serial number**: filter by board serial number (S/N).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**最大显示数量**：限制列表最多显示的条目数（默认 1000），输入后点击应用: **Max rows**: caps the number of rows displayed (default 1000); type a value and click Apply (not shown on the **Summary** tab).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.在 **不良元件** 和 **误判元件** 标签页下，过滤栏额外显示 **按位号: On the **Defective Components** and **False-Positive Components** tabs, the filter bar also exposes a **Search by designator / part number** input.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**总结** 标签页由三个并列面板组成：: The **Summary** tab has three side-by-side panels:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.显示所选时间范围内的整体统计数据，分为两个区域：: Shows aggregate statistics for the selected time range, split into two sections:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**PCBA** （整板维度）：检测总数、良好 **良好** 板数及占比、不良: **PCBA** (board-level): total inspected, **Good** board count and ratio, **Bad** board count and ratio.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**报警元件** （元件维度）：报警元件总数 （``defective_comp: **Alerted components** (component-level): total alerted component count (``defective_component_count``), plus:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**不良**：经反馈确认为不良的元件数及其 PPM 值；: **Defective**: feedback-confirmed defective component count, with PPM.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**误判**：被误报（系统预测不良但反馈为良好）的元件数及其 PPM 值；: **False positive**: component count of system-predicted defects that feedback marked good, with PPM.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**DPU**：每板平均缺陷数（Defects Per Unit）。: **DPU**: defects per unit (average defects per board).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.面板底部显示当前查询的时间范围（**从** … **到** …）。: The bottom of the panel shows the current query range (**From** … **To** …).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.以环形图（Donut Chart）直观展示合格（**合格**）与不良（**不良*: A donut chart visualizing the Pass (**Pass**) vs. NG (**NG**) board count and ratio; the legend uses green (Pass) and red (NG) swatches.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.当选定了具体基准产品时，展示该产品下报警次数最多的前 10 个元件，以横向柱状图: When a specific golden product is selected, shows the 10 most-frequently-alerted components as a horizontal bar chart (X = count, Y = designator). When no product is selected, a hint asks you to pick one first.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**检测结果** 标签页以列表形式列出每一条检测记录，各列含义如下：: The **Inspection Results** tab lists each inspection record with the following columns:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**PCBA名称**：本次检测所用基准产品名称。: **PCBA Name**: the golden product used for this inspection.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**序列号（S/N）**：板件序列号（无序列号时为空）。: **Serial Number (S/N)**: the board serial number (empty when none).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**总元件数量**：本次检测中参与检测的元件总数。: **Total Component Count**: the total number of components inspected this run.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**不良元件数量**：经反馈确认为不良的元件数。: **Defective Component Count**: feedback-confirmed defective component count.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**报警元件数量**：系统报警（含待复检）的元件总数。: **Alerted Component Count**: total components alerted by the system (including pending review).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**检测开始时间** / **检测结束时间**：本次检测的开始和结束时间戳。: **Inspection Start / End Time**: timestamps for the inspection.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**查看**：跳转至复检页面，在左侧查看该次检测的不良元件列表，在中部与右侧查看: **View**: opens the Review page — NG components on the left, whole-board thumbnail, zoomed defect image, localization box, defect type, and deciding feature in the center and right; feedback can be submitted directly.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**导出报告**：在新标签页打开该条记录的详细报告页面。: **Export Report**: opens the record's detailed report page in a new tab.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.列表顶部提供 **导出 CSV** 和 **删除选中记录** 操作，支持多选后批: The list header offers **Export CSV** and **Delete selected records**; multi-select for batch delete.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.在复检详情中，左侧列出该次检测的不良元件，中部与右侧展示整板及缺陷的放大图、定位: In the Review detail, defective components for this inspection are listed on the left; the center and right show the whole-board view plus the defect's enlarged image, localization box, defect type, and deciding feature. Feedback can be submitted directly and is written back to the dataset.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**不良元件** 和 **误判元件** 标签页结构相同，均以列表形式展示元件级别: **Defective Components** and **False-Positive Components** share the same layout — a component-level summary list with these columns:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**图片**：元件的检测截图缩略图。: **Image**: thumbnail of the component's inspection snapshot.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**料号（Part No.）**：元件料号（未设置时显示 N/A）。: **Part No.**: the component's part number (N/A when unset).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**拼版序列号**：子板序列号（非拼板产品显示 N/A）。: **Panel Serial No.**: the sub-board's serial number (N/A on non-panel products).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**主序列号**：整板序列号（无时显示 N/A）。: **Main Serial No.**: the whole-board serial number (N/A when none).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**拼版索引**：元件所属子板的序号（非拼板产品为空）。: **Panel Index**: the index of the sub-board the component sits on (empty on non-panel products).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**不良类型**：经反馈确认的不良类型（未提供反馈时显示 N/A）。: **Defect Type**: the defect type confirmed via feedback (N/A when no feedback yet).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**预测错误**：系统预测的错误类型（无预测时显示 N/A）。: **Predicted Error**: the error type predicted by the system (N/A when none).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.列表顶部显示元件总数并提供 **导出 CSV** 按钮。: The list header shows the total component count and provides an **Export CSV** button.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.两个标签页的区别：**不良元件** 显示系统预测不良且反馈确认为不良的元件；**: The difference between the two tabs: **Defective Components** lists components the system predicted as defective and feedback confirmed; **False-Positive Components** lists components the system predicted as defective but feedback marked good — the false-positive set, useful when diagnosing false-positive sources.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.**子板良率（FPY）与坏板标记**：对于拼板产品，良率可在 **整板** 与: **Sub-board FPY and badmarks**: on panel products, FPY can be switched between **Board** and **Sub-board** scopes, computed against the actual count of sub-boards inspected; non-panel products report **N/A** for the sub-board scope. Components marked as **badmark** drive the sub-board good / bad verdict but are **not counted** in the Review NG list nor in the Data Analysis Report's Total / Alerted / NG counts. The sub-board verdict logic (ratio mode / badmark mode) is configured under :ref:`检测设置（子板判废逻辑）`.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.提交的反馈会加入到产品的数据集中。推荐的迭代流程：: Submitted feedback flows into the product's dataset. The recommended iteration loop:
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.进行一批次的检测，在工作列表里查看并提供反馈，反馈后的数据可以加到数据集中。: Run a batch of inspections, review them in the Worklist, and submit feedback; the feedback flows into the dataset.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.回到产品编程页面，执行训练来更新模型（训练通常耗时约 1 分钟，视硬件而定）。: Return to the product programming page and train to update the model (typically about 1 minute, depending on hardware).
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.执行\"评估全部\"以检查各元件状态并针对仍为不合格的项微调参数。参考 :ref: Run **Evaluate All** to review each component's status and tune parameters for any still flagged. See :ref:`检测参数` for the tuning specifics.
